title: senecio hooglandii
intro: Senecio hooglandii, also known as Hoogland's ragwort or Jacob's coat, is a plant species in the daisy family native to the mountains of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio hooglandii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Senecio hooglandii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
